name: SubscriptionLifecycleManager

neutralConcepts: executionOrder: PaymentValidation=1, PlanStatusCheck=2, SETNX=3, SubscriptionWrite=4, ActivationEmit=5
IPaymentFabricService.validate() at ORDER 1 — REUSED from FLOW-09, not re-registered
Plan status must be ACTIVE at ORDER 2 — DRAFT/ARCHIVED plans rejected
paymentMethodId (vault ref) stored — paymentMethodToken (raw) NEVER stored. CF-12-4.
trialDays > 0 → status=TRIALING, trialEndsAt set. trialDays === 0 → status=ACTIVE.

ironRules.rule: IPaymentFabricService.validate() at ORDER 1 — invalid payment → failure(PAYMENT_INVALID), no state write.
Plan status must be ACTIVE at ORDER 2 — non-ACTIVE → failure(PLAN_NOT_ACTIVE).
SETNX at ORDER 3 — key=hash(tenantId+subscriberId+planId). Duplicate → failure(ALREADY_SUBSCRIBED).
storeDocument(subscription) at ORDER 4 BEFORE enqueue(SubscriptionActivated). DNA-8.
paymentMethodId (vault ref) stored — paymentMethodToken (raw client token) NEVER stored anywhere. CF-12-4.
IPaymentFabricService REUSED from FLOW-09 — not a new provider registration.
trialDays > 0 → status=TRIALING with trialEndsAt set. trialDays === 0 → status=ACTIVE immediately.

keywords: subscription lifecycle manager payment validation plan active SETNX paymentMethodToken vault ref trial TRIALING ACTIVE state machine
